_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: MFC analysis revealed an average of 50.3% of CD163+ TAM with PD-L1 expression and, in contrast, 15.6% of non-immune (CD45-) cells
details: Successfully distinguished immune from non-immune cells; 15.6% of CD45- (non-immune) cells expressed PD-L1 compared to 50.3% of CD163+ TAM
